SELECT id FROM CallHistory
WHERE id=callId FOR UPDATE
（锁本 call 行,串行化并发）

targetProductId=callId

wallet.debit
amount=minutes×perMin, quantity=minutes
targetProductId=callId
→ Transaction 落账 + User.balance 扣减
